description: Pepe (PEPE) emerged in 2023 as a satirical tribute to meme culture, captivating millions through humor and community power without presale, allocation, or roadmap. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — PEPE provides holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, transforming it from pure speculative hype into a fast, secure, and scalable memecoin in Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Pepe
